recommendations.detail: Deploy detection rules and hunt for exploitation indicators

S3_Agentic.safety_note: All recommendations require human analyst approval before execution

detections.recommendation: Deploy AI-aware email filtering. Train users on AI-generated phishing characteristics.
Implement media verification protocols. Require multi-factor authentication for sensitive actions.
Update EDR with polymorphic detection capabilities. Enable behavioral analysis mode.
Strengthen identity verification procedures. Deploy voice/communication authentication.

recommendations: Mitigate credential theft risk: credential stuffing, stolen credentials
Mitigate session hijack risk: session hijack, cookie theft, session fixation
Mitigate privilege escalation risk: privilege escalation, admin access, root access
Mitigate auth bypass risk: authentication bypass, auth bypass, 2fa bypass

findings.recommendation: Migrate to ML-KEM (CRYSTALS-Kyber) for key exchange
Replace with ML-KEM or hybrid key exchange

stix_transport.note: TLS 1.3 uses ECDHE - quantum vulnerable for key exchange

jwt_tokens.note: Symmetric crypto - quantum resistant (Grover halves keyspace)

S9_Quantum.recommendation: Begin hybrid key exchange deployment. Inventory all RSA/ECDSA usage for PQC migration.
